---
title: "Welcome to Carbon Bender"
date: 2026-06-26
categories: [announcement]
description: "The first post — what this blog is about and what's coming."
---

## Hello, world.

This is the first post on **Carbon Bender** — a blog dedicated to 
data-driven analysis on GHG emissions, decarbonisation, and sustainability.

## What's coming

Future posts will include:

- Emissions trend analysis by country and sector
- Interactive maps of global energy transitions
- Decarbonisation scenario modelling

Stay tuned.
